entry.title: Sunday Morning (or: The Dishwasher)
entry.summary:
Author: loser_boy08

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 573Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Merlin burns the toast, Arthur loads the dishwasher wrong, and neither of them is ready to admit what Sunday mornings have started to mean. Or: two weeks, one kitchen, and a very serious disagreement about bowl placement.

entry.title: I'll have you for breakfast
entry.summary:
Author: Angelmann

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,006Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

entry.title: A FAKE DESTINY REVERSAL
entry.summary:
Author: OfTintagel

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 785Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: When Morgana gets deceived to think Mordred is Emrys and Merlin is Arthur’s Bane, it gives Merlin opportunities he could only dream of. Or, Merlin pretends to be on Morgana’s side, pratically becomes a spy and they plot against poor Mordred together.

entry.title: The Legend
entry.summary:
Author: BlueTortoise137

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,413Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 221

Summary: Arthur remembers everything on his twenty first birthday. Merlin isn't there. - “Okay, so let me get this straight,” Arthur said, resisting the urge to bury his face in his hands and scream until the world made sense again. “We’ve all been reborn over a thousand years after our deaths, met one another, seemingly by chance, then all regained our memories on the same day, while wandering around a museum exhibit on our previous lives. Did I miss anything?”

entry.title: Eye-fucking across a round table
entry.summary:
Author: TheElizaRoza

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,677Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 70

Summary: Eye fucking: to stare at someone with nefariously explicit intent and for them to do it back is a bonus. Arthur Pendragon has a problem. He cannot stop staring at Merlin. At first he blames the fact that his servant is irritating, mysterious, and seemingly incapable of acting like a normal person. Then Morgana discovers Merlin's secret, magic begins slipping through the cracks, and Arthur finds himself uncovering layer after layer of the man standing beside him. Set during Season 2. Arthur learns Merlin has far more secrets than anyone suspected and discovers, to his increasing annoyance, that he doesn't seem to care.

entry.title: Princes and Pirates
entry.summary:
Author: SierraStyx

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,411Chapters: 5/15Kudos: 40

Summary: Morgan le Fey is Captain of the most feared pirate ship in all the lands. With her second Merlin at her side, they're unstoppable. That might all be about to change when a chance meeting with Prince Arthur and his knights forces everyone to confront things they never thought they'd have to. Relationships are born, friendships struggle to survive, and hidden truths are revealed as the crew of the Mermaid provides passage for the Prince of Camelot.It's a Merlin Pirate AU

entry.title: can't hide from the family line
entry.summary:
Author: froachy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,016Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 50

Summary: When Arthur finds out about Gwaine and Percival's relationship, he exiles them. Merlin won't accept that his man crush hates gay people. All he wants is a place for people to exist freely - Arthur doesn't believe he can make it. Angst ensues.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,836Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 78

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: I hope you like the stars I stole for you
entry.summary:
Author: theplanetsalign

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,169Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Wylan is the absolute boyfailure knight who is hated by his father, and he hates his life until a mysterious man runs through Camelot and he realises why he’s always felt so different from the other knights. Jesper hates the missions Kaz always sends him on, and the fact that he has to use his magic despite its illegality and promised death penalty for Kaz’s mysterious revenge he wants against Jan Van Eck, the king of Camelot. That is, until he runs into a small and uninterested knight who catches his eye.   Essentially Jesper and Wylan but they’re Merlin and Arthur? Also the rest of the gang are there eventually?? I have literally never written anything before so bear with me pls but at least it’s not AI!

entry.title: Leon's No Good Very Bad Day
entry.summary:
Author: SierraStyx

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,101Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 123

Summary: When Arthur doesn't show up to training, Leon realizes that Merlin has gone missing. In the interest of the kingdom not collapsing, he enlists the knights in a scheme to keep Arthur calm while they locate Merlin and bring him home before Arthur can declare war on anyone he thinks may have kidnapped his manservant.He discovers much more than he wanted to along the way.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 149,716Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 143

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?
